package.name: slamko_loop
package.description: slamko Tier-3 global: the never-lost supervisor (state machine + archive-don't-discard seal/branch + decoupled relocalize/weld gate, owns map→odom) + loop-closure-as-factor (P2.5) + relocalization seam (P3). Depends on slamko_core contracts only (Hard Rule #2); gates recovery OUTSIDE the estimator graph. Apache-2.0.
